tasks.title: Fetch and parse product research document from GitHub
tasks.description: Retrieve the raw content from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dydanz/simdikta/main/docs/product-research/ppdb-terintegrasi.md and extract all structured information including requirements, user stories, technical constraints, and system flows needed to write the TRD.
acceptance_criteria: Raw markdown content is successfully retrieved from the GitHub raw URL
All sections of the product research document are parsed and available
Key entities, workflows, user roles, and requirements are identified and catalogued

tasks.title: Write TRD markdown document for PPDB Terintegrasi
tasks.description: Based on the parsed product research content from TASK-001, produce a complete Technical Requirements Document (TRD) in markdown format and write it directly into the chat response AND save it to docs/trd/ppdb-terintegrasi.md. The TRD must cover: (1) Overview & Objectives, (2) Scope & Out-of-Scope, (3) Stakeholders & User Roles, (4) Functional Requirements with MoSCoW priority labels, (5) Non-Functional Requirements (performance, scalability, security, availability, compliance), (6) System Architecture & Component Overview, (7) Data Model & Entity Relationships, (8) API Contracts / Integration Points, (9) Authentication & Authorization Model, (10) Migration & Rollout Plan, (11) Risks & Mitigations, (12) Open Questions & Assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: Full TRD markdown content is output directly in the response for immediate review
File docs/trd/ppdb-terintegrasi.md is created or updated in the repository
Document contains all 12 required sections listed in the description
Every functional requirement is traceable back to the product research document
Non-functional requirements include measurable thresholds (e.g., p95 response time < 500ms, uptime > 99.5%)
Data model section lists all core entities with attributes, data types, and relationships
API contracts include endpoint path, HTTP method, request schema, response schema, and auth requirement for each integration point

tasks.title: Write TRD for PPDB Terintegrasi based on provided product research URL
tasks.description:
Produce a complete Technical Requirements Document (TRD) in markdown format based on the product research document at https://github.com/dydanz/simdikta/blob/main/docs/product-research/ppdb-terintegrasi.md. Use the Claude Code `WebFetch` tool to retrieve the page content directly from the GitHub URL. Then write the full TRD markdown content as output in the conversation AND save it to docs/trd/ppdb-terintegrasi.md in the repository.

The TRD must include the following sections:
1. Overview & Objectives
2. Scope & Out-of-Scope
3. Stakeholders & User Roles
4. Functional Requirements (MoSCoW prioritized)
5. Non-Functional Requirements (performance, scalability, security, availability, compliance)
6. System Architecture & Component Overview
7. Data Model & Entity Relationships
8. API Contracts / Integration Points
9. Authentication & Authorization Model
10. Migration & Rollout Plan
11. Risks & Mitigations
12. Open Questions & Assumptions
acceptance_criteria: The GitHub product research URL is fetched successfully using WebFetch tool
Full TRD markdown is written as output in the conversation for immediate review
File docs/trd/ppdb-terintegrasi.md is created or updated in the repository
Every functional requirement is traceable to content found in the product research document
Non-functional requirements include measurable thresholds (e.g., p95 response time < 500ms, uptime > 99.5%)
Data model section lists core entities with attributes, data types, and relationships
API contracts include endpoint path, HTTP method, request schema, response schema, and auth requirement
